name: Papa Bear's Own Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dried lentils (washed and picked over)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring chicken stock and water to a boil.
2. Add all the other ingredients at once.
3. Bring back to a boil; continue boiling for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for one hour. The soup is done when it reaches your desired consistency and flavor.
